title: mesosphaerum glaucum
intro: Mesosphaerum glaucum, also known as Blue Peppermint or Brazilian Peppermint, is a perennial plant native to South America. It is a member of the Lamiaceae family and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which is rich in menthone, menthyl acetate, and limonene. The health benefits of Mesosphaerum glaucum include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Mesosphaerum glaucum can be prepared as an essential oil, infusion, or tincture, which can be used externally for skin issues and internally to support digestive health.
